posts.text: In Russia, “the future is no longer discussed in terms of what Vladimir Putin will decide, but as something that will unfold independently of him—and possibly already without him,” writes a former senior official in the country’s government https://www.economist.com/by-invitation/2026/05/06/vladimir-putin-is-losing-his-grip-on-russia?taid=6a3cbf394493680001f184c8&utm_campaign=editorial-social&utm_content=discovery.content&utm_medium=social-media.content.np&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: President Trump says the US "stands ready, willing, and able to help" after two major earthquakes hit Venezuela. The United States Geological Survey estimates the death toll from these earthquakes to reach between 10,000 and 100,000 people.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: If you think the new Fed chair is a hawk you’re crazy. They will run it hot… they will print and create inflation. We are going to have an incredible 2 year run… I’m buying precious metals with both hands. Amazing how the narrative has changed in the last 6 months or so.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
